LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE KNOWS ELIZABETH SALVESON WHOSE NAME APPEARS ON THE PLEADING. THEY WERE BOTH PARTNERS AT THE HOWARD & RICE LAW FIRM. JUDGE MILLER LEFT THE FIRM IN 1995. SHE SEES HER SOCIALLY FROM TIME TO TIME. THIS FACT DOES NOT AFFECT THE COURT'S ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. THE COURT GAVE COUNSEL THE OPPORTUNITY TO ASK QUESTIONS. NO QUESTIONS WERE ASKED OR OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S HEARING ON THE APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 29, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M IN DEPT. 302 FOR SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING ON PUBLISHED DECISIONS. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF TO BE FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF BY AUGUST 23, 2013 AND SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF TO BE FILED BY THE DEFENDANT BY AUGUST 26, 2013. SERVICE BY E-MAIL AND FAX WAS ALLOWED BY THE COURT. COURTESY COPIES TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Hearing And Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Charlotte Noss, Esq. and Carole Vigne, Esq. of Legal Aid Society, Tel. 415.864.8848 for plaintiff and moving party;
Lawrence W. Fasano, Jr., Esq. of Fasano Law Office, Tel. 415.432.4401, for defendants and opposing party.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the Court issued its tentative ruling. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court denied PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Hearing And Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Continued To Aug-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLOTTE NOSS & ATTY. CAROLE VIGNE OF THE LEGAL AID SOCIETY, TEL. NO. 864-8848 X260 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. LAWRENCE FASANO JR. OF THE FASANO LAW OFFICE, TEL. NO. 432-4401 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - Judge Miller disclosed that she knows Elizabeth Salveson whose name appears on the pleading. They were both partners at the Howard & Rice Law firm. Judge Miller left the firm in 1995. She sees her socially from time to time. This fact does not affect the Court's ability to be fair and impartial in this case. The Court gave counsel the opportunity to ask questions. No questions were asked or objections were raised. The matter was argued. PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Hearing on the Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued to August 29, 2013 at 9:30 a.m in Dept. 302 for supplemental briefing on published decisions. Supplemental brief to be filed by the Plaintiff by August 23, 2013 and Supplemental brief to be filed by the defendant by August 26, 2013. Service by e-mail and fax was allowed by the court. Courtesy copies to be delivered to Dept. 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
